endgame.viking_conquest.title: The Vikings have conquered the island!
endgame.defeated.title: {name} defeated
endgame.victory.title: {name} wins!
tutorial.tower.place: Place the tower at the highlighted tile.
tutorial.rally: Long-press the highlighted tile to rally recruits there.
tutorial.claim.win_now: Press Win Now to claim victory.
tutorial.claim.continue: Press Continue Playing to keep going.
tutorial.move.pick_up: {Verb} the highlighted unit to pick it up.
tutorial.move.combine: Move the selected {level} onto the target {target} to combine them into a {combined}.
tutorial.move.clear_tree: Move the selected {level} onto the tree to clear it.
tutorial.move.remove_grave: Move the selected {level} onto the grave to remove it.
tutorial.move.capture_tower: Move the selected {level} onto the highlighted tile to destroy the tower and capture the tile.
tutorial.move.capture_tree: Move the selected {level} onto the highlighted tile to clear the tree and capture the tile.
tutorial.move.capture: Move the selected {level} onto the highlighted tile to capture it.
tutorial.move.generic: Move the unit to the highlighted tile.
tutorial.buy.upgrade: Now press the Buy Recruit button again to upgrade to a {level}.
tutorial.buy.cycle: Press the Buy Recruit button to cycle to a {level}.
tutorial.place.combine: Place the {level} onto the target {target} to combine them into a {combined}.
tutorial.place.generic: Place the {level} at the highlighted tile.
tutorial.place.capture_tower: Place the {level} at the highlighted tile to destroy the tower and capture the tile.
tutorial.place.capture_tree: Place the {level} at the highlighted tile to clear the tree and capture the tile.
tutorial.place.capture_grave: Place the {level} at the highlighted tile to remove the grave and capture the tile.
tutorial.place.capture: Place the {level} at the highlighted tile to capture it.
tutorial.place.clear_tree: Place the {level} at the highlighted tile to clear the tree.
tutorial.place.remove_grave: Place the {level} at the highlighted tile to remove the grave.
hud.tour.buy.body.collapsed: Buy a unit — {verb} repeatedly to cycle unit type. Upgrade toward Soldier, Captain, and Commander by merging with a previously placed unit.
hud.tour.help.body: Use Next and Back to step through the HUD UI elements. {Verb} any element to select it. Close returns to play.
editor.tooltip.paint_land_cycle: Paint land — {verb} to cycle player color
